mapper.sql: select reply_id, reply_type, reply_status, content, topic_id, user_id, target_id, create_time from chat_topic_reply
mapper.select: SELECT ctr.reply_id, ctr.reply_type, ctr.content, ctr.create_time ,ctr.user_id,IF(cf.remark_nick_name IS NULL OR cf.remark_nick_name='', cu.nick_name,cf.remark_nick_name) AS display_name, IF(cf.remark_nick_name IS NULL OR cf.remark_nick_name='', cu.nick_name,cf.remark_nick_name) AS nick_name, cu.head_image_thumb as portrait ,if(ctr.reply_type = '2', ctr.target_id, null) as to_user_id, IF(cff.remark_nick_name IS NULL OR cff.remark_nick_name='', cuu.nick_name,cff.remark_nick_name) AS to_display_name, IF(cff.remark_nick_name IS NULL OR cff.remark_nick_name='', cuu.nick_name,cff.remark_nick_name) AS to_nick_name, cuu.head_image_thumb as to_portrait FROM chat_topic_reply ctr LEFT JOIN im_friend cf ON cf.friend_id = ctr.user_id AND cf.deleted = 0 AND cf.user_id = #{userId} LEFT JOIN im_user cu ON cu.id = ctr.user_id and cu.status = 0 LEFT JOIN im_friend cff ON cff.friend_id = ctr.target_id AND cff.deleted = 0 AND cff.user_id = #{userId} and ctr.reply_type = '2' LEFT JOIN im_user cuu ON cuu.id = ctr.target_id AND cuu.status = 0 and ctr.reply_type = '2' WHERE ctr.topic_id = #{topicId} AND ctr.reply_status = 'Y'
